foundations.reason: Immunosuppressed transplant recipients are highly vulnerable to opportunistic and surgical infections

objectives: SU13.1: Describe the immunological basis of organ transplantation
SU13.2: Discuss the Principles of immunosuppressive therapy. Enumerate
SU13.3: Discuss the legal and ethical issues concerning organ donation
SU13.4: Counsel patients and relatives on organ donation in a simulated
integration: This undergraduate-level roadmap connects Organ Transplantation across foundational sciences and clinical applications.
